meta.name: PRSM UPGRADE: BridgeSecurity via UUPS
meta.description: Upgrades BridgeSecurity proxy. This contract handles signature verification for FTNSBridge messages. Upgrade only — BridgeSecurity has no pause function. PRECONDITIONS for cosigning: (1) new implementation source-verified on Basescan, (2) auditor SAFE-TO-DEPLOY verdict, (3) signature-verification-logic diff publicly disclosed (high-stakes — cryptography), (4) 4-of-5 governance threshold, (5) extra scrutiny: bridge security upgrades are highest-risk class of upgrade because flaws are immediately exploitable.
